ddls:
CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the senior living community */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the community */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the community */,
  "type_of_facility" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., ASST for assisted living) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of residents the community can accommodate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the community */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the community's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the community was established */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community */,
  "rate" REAL /* Monthly rate charged to residents */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate became effective */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate is no longer effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_rates_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community where the unit is located */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Unit number */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the unit is currently available */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the unit */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the unit */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the service (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_services" (
  "community_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the community-service relationship */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the service started being offered */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the service stopped being offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_services_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community where the resident lives */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit occupied by the resident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the resident */,
  "care_level" TEXT /* Level of care required by the resident */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Resident's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Resident's gender */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the resident was admitted to the community */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the resident was discharged */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the resident has */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any allergies the resident has */,
  "care_plan" TEXT /* Details of the resident's care plan */,
  "next_of_kin_name" TEXT /* Name of the next of kin */,
  "next_of_kin_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the next of kin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community where the staff member works */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date at the community */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Staff member's gender */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Staff member's date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Staff member's email */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Staff member's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Staff member's address */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the staff member's employment */,
  "training_records" TEXT /* Details of the staff member's training records */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit where the maintenance was performed */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who performed the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was completed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)
